title: SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for Fluid Enterprise capability manifests. Every generated capability must validate against this schema.

kind.description: skill = single function, agent = stateful loop, workflow = multi-step DAG

generation.description: Evolution generation that produced this capability

parent.description: ID of parent capability this mutated from, null if de novo

stage.description: Lifecycle stage governed by the Evolution Engine

owner.description: Tenant or team that owns this capability

budget_monthly_usd.description: Maximum monthly spend in USD. Hard stop when reached.

inputs.description: Typed input parameters the capability accepts

outputs.description: Typed output values the capability produces

tools.description: External tools this capability is allowed to call (allowlisted)

fitness_objective.description: What fitness means for this capability — the objective function. E.g. 'Minimize vendor risk exposure score across portfolio'

eval_suite.description: Path to JSONL evaluation file relative to capability directory
